title: lyonia brittonii
intro: Lyonia brittonii, also known as Britton's shealtha or Britton's fern alder, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Lyonia brittonii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat colds, flu, and other minor ailments.
